title: OAP Registry Implementation Listing
description: Schema for an entry in implementations/<slug>.json. Defined in RFC 0026.

slug.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated identifier; matches the filename without .json.

tool_did.description: Decentralized identifier of the implementation. did:web is preferred.

conformance_level.description: Highest claimed Conformance Level. Suffix -NC denotes the Non-Commercial Profile (RFC 0025); suffix -FINANCE denotes the L5-FINANCE Tier (RFC 0028); suffix -ORG denotes the L5-ORG Tier (RFC 0030).

conformance_receipt_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact bytes served at conformance_receipt_uri.

expires_at.description: Receipt expiry; max 90 days after issued_at per RFC 0019.

license.description: SPDX identifier for the implementation source license.

provisional.description: Set to true when the DID domain is younger than 30 days. Provisional listings are excluded from default Marketplace results until the 30-day mark.
